methodology: hand-evaluation plus existing repository checks per ADR draft decision D2

kpi_outcomes.label: Feature-delivery runs complete without intervention beyond designed gates
kpi_outcomes.evidence: Manual persona invocation remains required; insufficient run-volume sample for 70% threshold.
kpi_outcomes.gap_routing: Backlog: automate Cursor transport before measuring A1.

kpi_outcomes.label: Merged PRs reference PRD/RFC/ADR
kpi_outcomes.evidence: Bootstrap commits use Bootstrap-Phase trailers; PR merge cadence not yet instrumented.
kpi_outcomes.gap_routing: Defer until ship stage produces merge metrics.

kpi_outcomes.label: Doc-rot KPI (<5% broken dual-anchor citations after 90 days)
kpi_outcomes.evidence: 90-day window not elapsed; refresh-citations tooling exists but long-window metric is not baselined.
kpi_outcomes.gap_routing: Schedule librarian curation cadence per knowledge-curation cron seed.

kpi_outcomes.label: DORA lead time <24h for low-risk work
kpi_outcomes.evidence: No DORA instrumentation in pan status yet.

kpi_outcomes.label: Inbox SLA (ack within 1 invocation; status within 1h)
kpi_outcomes.evidence: Feature-delivery runs emit handoff cards and run logs on invoke; dogfood runs demonstrate acknowledgement path.

kpi_outcomes.label: US-1 spec-canonicalization round-trip
kpi_outcomes.evidence: Phase 4 US-1 dogfood exit ratified 2026-05-19 with delivery report and proof bundle.

kpi_outcomes.label: US-2 chat-with-persona indexing
kpi_outcomes.evidence: chat-with-persona pipeline runtime is backlog-deferred to M2.

kpi_outcomes.label: US-3 frontend-delivery contract violations
kpi_outcomes.evidence: frontend-delivery pipeline lands M2.

kpi_outcomes.label: US-4 gate failures with threshold attribution
kpi_outcomes.evidence: Threshold-policy schema exists; full attribution loop not exercised across all pipelines.
kpi_outcomes.gap_routing: Expand compliance descriptors as pipelines harden.

kpi_outcomes.label: US-5 scout RFC cadence
kpi_outcomes.evidence: Scouts and ensembles are M4 scope.

kpi_outcomes.label: US-6 parallel-cohort merge conflicts
kpi_outcomes.evidence: Parallel cohort execution lands M2.

kpi_outcomes.label: Ombudsperson catches per week
kpi_outcomes.evidence: Ombudsperson persona is M5; human plays gate role during bootstrap.

kpi_outcomes.label: Onboarding time <1 day to first PR
kpi_outcomes.evidence: No structured onboarding telemetry captured yet.
kpi_outcomes.gap_routing: Capture during next external adopter pilot.

kpi_outcomes.label: Cost per feature-delivery in pan status
kpi_outcomes.evidence: pan status reports task state but not median cost series.

kpi_outcomes.label: US-7 groomer RFC decision latency
kpi_outcomes.evidence: Groomer persona and debt-grooming pipeline are M3 scope.

kpi_outcomes.label: US-8 primitive stability and horizontal-dep enforcement
kpi_outcomes.evidence: check-phase-0a-scaffold.mjs and ESLint no-horizontal-primitive-deps rule enforce package boundaries.

kpi_outcomes.label: US-9 pan init on representative repos
kpi_outcomes.evidence: Kit and in-repo evaluator land in this feature; live candidate-monorepo run is follow-on gate.
kpi_outcomes.gap_routing: Follow-on bootstrap-gate inbox item after kit ratification.

kpi_outcomes.label: US-10 pause/resume/abort responsiveness
kpi_outcomes.evidence: Phase 4 intervention probe captured pause/resume/abort evidence in pause-resume-abort-evidence.json.

kpi_outcomes.label: Bootstrap M1: init-greenfield pipeline definition and evidence kit
kpi_outcomes.evidence: init-greenfield.yaml present; greenfield evidence schema, fixture, and evaluator added under feature folder.

kpi_outcomes.label: Bootstrap M1: adopt pipeline and adopter persona wiring
kpi_outcomes.evidence: adopt.yaml and adopter persona exist; setup steps documented in feature index operator guide.

kpi_outcomes.label: Bootstrap M1: knowledge-curation cron-seed contract
kpi_outcomes.evidence: knowledge-curation.yaml metadata.cron_seed defines cadence, trigger, and artifact destinations.

kpi_outcomes.label: Bootstrap M1: KPI baseline evidence package
kpi_outcomes.evidence: This file records reproducible outcomes for A1-A18 and A22-A27 pending ADR authoring.

kpi_outcomes.label: Bootstrap M1: handbook seed stability inventory
kpi_outcomes.evidence: Inventory prepared for reviewer/librarian promotion pass; no promotions applied in implement stage.

kpi_outcomes.label: Bootstrap M1: Phoenix/Langfuse trace verification deferral
kpi_outcomes.evidence: Deferral documented in lib/memory/features/us-1-dogfood-phase-4-exit/phoenix-trace-evidence.md with @pancreator/run-logger ownership.

handbook_stability_inventory.note: All lib/memory/handbook/** seeds still carry stability: experimental; promotion decisions route to tech-lead/reviewer/librarian.
